summary: Customer Display and Pair Display feature testing complete. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features working correctly. New features tested: Customer Display screen at /display with 4-digit pairing code, Pair Display screen at /pair-display with code input and paired displays management, POS header 'Skärm' button navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Customer Display screen properly implements pairing flow with 4-digit code generation
✅ Polling mechanism for pairing status (2-second intervals) works correctly
✅ Pair Display screen has all required testID attributes for testing
✅ POS header includes 'Skärm' button with proper navigation to /pair-display
✅ Backend APIs handle authentication properly (pair endpoint requires auth, display endpoint allows unauthenticated access)
✅ Pairing code expiration (5 minutes) implemented correctly
✅ In-memory pairing code storage with automatic cleanup of expired codes
✅ Database persistence for paired displays with device name and timestamps
✅ Connection status tracking based on last_active timestamp (2-minute threshold)
✅ All React Native components properly used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, TextInput, SafeAreaView)
✅ Mobile-first design with proper spacing and touch targets
seed_data_creation: One test paired display created during backend testing: 'Test Kundskärm'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Display and Pair Display features fully functional. Backend APIs 100% passing. Frontend UI tested on mobile viewport with all interactions working. Previous features (login, POS, admin, orders, profile) were not re-tested as per instructions - they already passed 100% in iteration_1.

backend_apis.check_code_unpaired: ✅ GET /api/customer-display/check-code/{code} returns valid=true, paired=false for unpaired code
backend_apis.check_code_invalid: ✅ GET /api/customer-display/check-code/9999 returns valid=false for invalid code
backend_apis.pair_with_auth: ✅ POST /api/customer-display/pair successfully pairs display with valid token and code
backend_apis.get_paired_displays: ✅ GET /api/customer-display/paired-displays returns list of paired displays for authenticated user
backend_apis.connection_status: ✅ GET /api/customer-display/connection-status shows connected status and count
backend_apis.get_display_data: ✅ GET /api/customer-display?user_id=xxx returns display data for customer screen
backend_apis.reset_display: ✅ POST /api/customer-display/reset resets display to idle state

customer_display_screen.route: ✅ Loads at /display route (standalone, no auth required)
customer_display_screen.title: ✅ Shows 'Koppla kundskärm' title
customer_display_screen.regenerate_button: ✅ 'Generera ny kod' button works (code changes on click)
customer_display_screen.code_display: ✅ Shows 4 digit boxes with large green numbers
customer_display_screen.tv_icon: ✅ TV icon displayed in pairing UI

pair_display_screen.title: ✅ Title 'Koppla kundskärm' visible
pair_display_screen.connection_status: ✅ Connection status indicator shows 'Ingen skärm ansluten' when no active display
pair_display_screen.code_input: ✅ Code input field accepts 4-digit numeric input (testID='pair-code-input')
pair_display_screen.code_input_validation: ✅ Input limited to 4 digits, numeric only
pair_display_screen.display_list: ✅ Shows paired displays (1 display: 'Test Kundskärm' from backend tests)
pair_display_screen.display_info: ✅ Each display shows device name, paired date/time, TV icon
pair_display_screen.unpair_button: ✅ Unpair button (unlink icon) present on each display row
pair_display_screen.help_text: ✅ Help text at bottom mentions /display route
